it:2.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:2.3: "Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return. Which one quality?
it:2.4: Abandon aversion as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return."
it:2.5:
Beings corrupted with hate
Go to a bad destination:
From rightly discerning that hate,
Those who see clearly let go.
Letting go, they never come to this world again.
it:2.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
